EmptyDataBind.SQL: SELECT TOP 20 fot.Ident ,fotAgg.FolderNames AS [Name] FROM dbo.FolderTree as fot INNER JOIN dbo.Folder as fol on fol.ID = fot.FolderID AND fol.[State] = @FolderActiveState OUTER APPLY ( SELECT TOP(1) fotC.ParentFolderTreeID FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fotC INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS folC ON folC.ID = fotC.FolderID AND folC.[State] = @FolderActiveState WHERE fotC.ParentFolderTreeID = fot.ID ) AS fotC OUTER APPLY ( SELECT STRING_AGG(folP.[Name], ' → ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY fotP.Level ASC) AS FolderNames FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fotP INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS folP ON folP.ID = fotP.FolderID WHERE fot.Ident LIKE fotP.Ident + '%' ) AS fotAgg WHERE fol.FolderGroupSegmentIdent = @FolderGroupSegmentIdent AND fotC.ParentFolderTreeID IS NULL ORDER BY fot.Ident

DataBind.SQL: SELECT fot.Ident ,fotAgg.FolderNames AS [Name] FROM dbo.FolderTree as fot INNER JOIN dbo.Folder as fol on fol.ID = fot.FolderID AND fol.[State] = @FolderActiveState OUTER APPLY ( SELECT TOP(1) fotC.ParentFolderTreeID FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fotC INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS folC ON folC.ID = fotC.FolderID AND folC.[State] = @FolderActiveState WHERE fotC.ParentFolderTreeID = fot.ID ) AS fotC OUTER APPLY ( SELECT STRING_AGG(folP.[Name], ' → ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY fotP.Level ASC) AS FolderNames FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fotP INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS folP ON folP.ID = fotP.FolderID WHERE fot.Ident LIKE fotP.Ident + '%' ) AS fotAgg WHERE fol.FolderGroupSegmentIdent = @FolderGroupSegmentIdent AND fotC.ParentFolderTreeID IS NULL AND fol.[Name] LIKE @CommonFolderTreeIdent ORDER BY fot.Ident

SelectedDataBind.SQL: SELECT fot.Ident ,fotAgg.FolderNames AS [Name] FROM dbo.FolderTree as fot INNER JOIN dbo.Folder as fol on fol.ID = fot.FolderID OUTER APPLY ( SELECT STRING_AGG(folP.[Name], ' → ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY fotP.Level ASC) AS FolderNames FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fotP INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS folP ON folP.ID = fotP.FolderID WHERE fot.Ident LIKE fotP.Ident + '%' ) AS fotAgg WHERE fol.FolderGroupSegmentIdent = @FolderGroupSegmentIdent AND fot.[Ident] = @CommonFolderTreeIdent
